---
title: "Manuscripts"

format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <script async src="https://badge.dimensions.ai/badge.js" charset="utf-8"></script>
        <script async src="https://embed.altmetric.com/assets/embed.js"></script>

execute:
  echo: false
---

```{r warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}


library(RefManageR)
library(tidyverse)

# ---- Names to bold ----
bold_names <- c(
  "Vagish Hemmige",
  "Vagish S. Hemmige"
)

bold_matches <- function(text, patterns) {
  for (p in patterns) {
    text <- str_replace_all(text, fixed(p), str_c("**", p, "**"))
  }
  text
}

# ---- Remove BibTeX brace protection ----
clean_braces <- function(x) {
  str_replace_all(x, "\\{|\\}", "")
}

# ---- Read main library ----
refs <- ReadBib("data/VH library.bib")

# ---- Build clean dataframe ----
df_clean <-
  as_tibble(as.data.frame(refs), rownames = "key") %>%
  mutate(
    year = as.numeric(year),

    # ---- Authors ----
    authors = map_chr(author, ~ paste(.x, collapse = ", ")),
    authors = clean_braces(authors),
    authors = str_replace_all(authors, " and ", ", "),
    authors = bold_matches(authors, bold_names),

    # ---- Clean fields ----
    title     = clean_braces(title),
    journal   = clean_braces(journal),
    booktitle = clean_braces(booktitle),

    # ---- Citation core ----
    citation_core = case_when(

      # Journal article
      !is.na(journal) ~ str_c(
        authors, ". ",
        str_remove(title, "\\.$"), ". ",
        "*", journal, "* ",
        year,
        if_else(!is.na(volume), str_c(";", volume), ""),
        if_else(!is.na(number), str_c("(", number, ")"), ""),
        if_else(!is.na(pages), str_c(":", pages), ""),
        "."
      ),

      # Book chapter
      !is.na(booktitle) ~ str_c(
        authors, ". ",
        str_remove(title, "\\.$"), ". ",
        "In: *", booktitle, "*",
        if_else(!is.na(publisher), str_c(", ", publisher), ""),
        " (", year, ")",
        if_else(!is.na(pages), str_c(", pp. ", pages), ""),
        "."
      ),

      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),

    # ---- DOI badges ----
    badges = if_else(
      !is.na(doi) & doi != "",
      str_c(
        '<span class="__dimensions_badge_embed__" data-doi="',
        doi,
        '" data-style="large_rectangle"></span>',
        '<div data-badge-popover="right" data-badge-type="1" data-doi="',
        doi,
        '" data-hide-no-mentions="true" class="altmetric-embed"></div>'
      ),
      ""
    ),

    citation = str_c(
      citation_core,
      if_else(!is.na(doi) & doi != "",
              str_c(" [doi](https://doi.org/", doi, ")"),
              ""),
      " ",
      badges
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(citation)) %>%
  arrange(desc(year))


# ---- Split into sections ----
df_journal <- df_clean %>%
  filter(!is.na(journal))

df_chapter <- df_clean %>%
  filter(is.na(journal) & !is.na(booktitle))


# ---- Print function ----
print_section <- function(df, section_title) {

  cat("\n\n# ", section_title, "\n\n", sep = "")

  years_desc <- sort(unique(df$year), decreasing = TRUE)

  for (yr in years_desc) {

    cat("\n\n## ", yr, "\n\n", sep = "")

    subset <- df %>% filter(year == yr)

    for (i in seq_len(nrow(subset))) {

      key_i <- subset$key[[i]]
      cit_i <- subset$citation[[i]]

      cat("### {#", key_i, "}\n\n", sep = "")
      cat(cit_i, "\n\n")
    }
  }
}



```


```{r results='asis'}


print_section(df_journal, "Peer-Reviewed Journal Articles")
print_section(df_chapter, "Book Chapters")


```
